articles.title: Dhaliwal inspects city petrol stations, orders fuel sampling
articles.description: AAP’s chief spokesperson and former minister Kuldeep Singh Dhaliwal on Tuesday inspected several petrol pumps in the Ajnala area and ordered the collection of petrol samples to check the ethanol content in the fuel.

articles.title: Seven airline stocks that could take flight as oil prices fall
articles.description: Ryanair Holdings, Europe’s largest airline by passengers, and Copa Holdings, a Panama City-based carrier, both stand to benefit from falling prices

articles.title: Big Oil's Windfall Earnings Threaten to Reignite Trump's Price-Gouging Push
articles.description: Trump is escalating pressure on oil companies, accusing them of price gouging and demanding gasoline prices fall toward $2.50 per gallon.

articles.title: Dollar Edges Up on Weak Stocks and Crude Oil Strength
articles.description: The dollar index (DXY00 ) rose by +0.24% on Tuesday. The dollar rose on Tuesday amid weakness in stocks, boosting liquidity demand for the currency. Also, higher crude oil prices on Tuesday pushed up inflation expectations and could persuade the Fe...

articles.title: U.S. Revokes Iran Oil License Amid Hormuz Tensions
articles.description: The United States revoked a general license allowing the sale of Iranian oil in response to unacceptable actions by Iran in the Strait of Hormuz. This move follows reports of attacks on tankers in the region, threatening fragile diplomacy between the U.S. and Iran and affecting global oil prices.

articles.title: Nat-Gas Prices Climb on Carryover Support from European Nat-Gas
articles.description: August Nymex natural gas (NGQ26 ) on Tuesday closed up +0.020 (+0.62%). Nat-gas prices pushed higher on Tuesday amid carryover support from a rally in European nat-gas prices to a 3-week high after a Qatari LNG gas carrier was attacked in the Strait...

articles.title: U.S. revoking license that authorized Iranian oil sales after tanker attacks
articles.description: Oil prices rose more than five per cent following the announcement

articles.title: Tensions Ignite: Strait of Hormuz Under Threat After Tanker Attacks
articles.description: Recent attacks on Qatari and Saudi tankers near the Strait of Hormuz have escalated tensions, prompting maritime authorities to raise the threat level for vessels to 'severe'. The incidents highlight ongoing volatility and have affected shipping traffic and oil prices. Diplomatic talks between Iran and the U.S. continue amid the tensions.
